positive: A minimalist, abstract illustration of a stylized mountain range at sunrise. The mountains should be rendered in strong, contrasting silhouettes—deep indigo and burnt orange against a pale sky gradient. Include scattered stylized constellations and celestial elements like crescent moons and tiny, abstract glowing stars. The composition must be centered and suitable for apparel printing, maximizing clean edges and high contrast. Style: Modern, geometric, clean line work, vector illustration quality. Aspect: Square composition.
